kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Mason, Candles, Eastcheap, and 5 coins belong to different artisans.
Millpond goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Tanner, Barrels, Baron, and 5 coins.
Edmund's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the Carpenter.
The artisan who makes Barrels' levy is higher than both the Tanner and the artisan in Southgate.
The artisan who makes Candles' levy is immediately below the artisan serving the Countess.
Edmund, Southgate, and 5 coins go with Baron, Countess, and Sheriff, in some order.
The Mason and Rowan are in the same ward.
4 coins goes with at most two of Godfrey, Carpenter, Candles, Millpond, and Sheriff.
Godfrey's levy is between the artisan who makes Horseshoes and the Mason.
